The '''New Republic Fourth Fleet''' was a major fleet unit of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. It was presumably formed out of the [[Fourth Battle Group (Rebel Alliance)|Rebel Alliance Fourth Battle Group]]. Under the command of [[Voon Massa]] and then [[Chel Dorat]], it saw significant fighting during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends#The advance of the New Republic (4-6 ABY)|New Republic liberation campaign]] in the two years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. From [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] it became a major defensive command based in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]], and fought in the [[Imperial Skirmishes|last major fleet campaign]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Imperial Remnant]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the Fourth Fleet was reorganized along with the rest of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]], becoming the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]].

==History==
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Fourth Fleet was placed under command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Voon Massa]] and operated out of [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]], with the mission of liberating the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. The fleet was victorious at [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]], [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]], [[Spirana/Legends|Spirana]] and eventually captured [[Denon/Legends|Denon]]. Massa was killed at Denon but the victory allowed the New Republic to penetrate the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. Voon Massa was succeeded by Admiral [[Chel Dorat]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

During the [[Thrawn campaign]], the Fourth Fleet was deployed at [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] as a rapid reaction force.<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] reform of the New Republic Defense Fleet, the Fourth Fleet was reorganised around a structure of modular [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] and [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], the Fourth Fleet was held back from the New Republic's campaign in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Towards the end of the conflict, it was dispatched to blockade [[Nanta-Ri]].

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Dif Scaur]] served as commander of the Fourth Fleet prior to his appointment as [[Director of New Republic Intelligence]]. [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] commanded it in the [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] [[Imperial Skirmishes|campaign]] against [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] [[replacement warlord]]s in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], defeating them at the [[Battle of Columus (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Columus]].

It later became the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]].
